title: Signedness of B operand of shift

features.name: shift with signed B operand using $signed() cast
features.description: Code should include a shift operation with $signed(B) casting and unary minus negation where B is treated as signed for shift amount
features.snippet:
parameter B_SIGNED = 0;
if (B_SIGNED) assign Y = $signed(B) < 0 ? A << -B : A >> B;

features.name: ternary expression with shift and signed operand
features.description: Code should include a ternary expression comparing $signed(B) to zero with left and right shift operations as branches

features.name: signed parameter controlling shift behavior
features.description: Code should include a B_SIGNED parameter controlling whether shift operand is treated as signed
features.snippet:
parameter B_SIGNED = 0;
if (B_SIGNED) assign Y = $signed(B) < 0 ? A << -B : A >> B;
